category_sources: source_facts.description identifies dash-shell as a POSIX-compliant descendant of NetBSD ash.
display_name_sources: source_facts.executables lists dash; official repository mirror title is DASH Shell.
docs_sources: Official source repository contains the dash.1 manual page; this is the canonical documentation surface when no dedicated docs site is supplied.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official kernel.googlesource mirror states it is mirrored from git://git.kernel.org/pub/scm/utils/dash/dash.git.
tags_sources: source_facts.description states POSIX-compliant descendant of NetBSD ash; source_facts.executables lists dash.
